response.bio_s:
Dr. Stephanie Bernik is a highly experienced surgeon who specializes in oncology, with 33 years of practice dedicated to surgical cancer care. She focuses on providing comprehensive surgical treatment for cancer patients, combining her extensive experience with advanced surgical techniques to deliver personalized care for each patient's unique needs.

Dr. Bernik earned her medical degree from Yale University School of Medicine, one of the nation's leading medical institutions. She practices at Lenox Hill Hospital and maintains offices in New York, NY, where patients can access her specialized surgical oncology services. Her long-standing commitment to cancer surgery has made her a trusted choice for patients seeking expert surgical care in the treatment of various cancers.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Robert Gelfand is a medical doctor specializing in hematology, internal medicine, and oncology with 36 years of experience. He focuses on treating blood disorders and cancer, providing comprehensive care for patients facing these complex conditions. His extensive experience allows him to offer expert diagnosis and treatment planning for a wide range of blood-related diseases and various forms of cancer.

Dr. Gelfand completed his medical education at SUNY Downstate Medical Center College of Medicine and went on to complete his residency training at New York Presbyterian Hospital. He practices at American Infusion Centers with locations in New York, NY, where patients can receive specialized infusion therapies and cancer treatments. Dr. Gelfand is fluent in both English and Spanish, enabling him to communicate effectively with a diverse patient population throughout the New York area.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Randall Owen specializes in oncology and surgery, providing comprehensive cancer care that combines medical treatment with surgical expertise. They focus on treating patients who need both medical oncology services and surgical interventions as part of their cancer treatment plan. Dr. Owen is affiliated with The Mount Sinai Hospital, which provides access to advanced cancer treatment technologies and multidisciplinary care teams.

Dr. Owen completed residency training at Albert Einstein College of Medicine, gaining extensive experience in both oncological and surgical approaches to cancer care. They practice at multiple locations throughout New York and the surrounding area, including the Bronx, Manhattan, Yonkers, and Scarsdale, making specialized cancer care accessible to patients across the region. Dr. Owen speaks Spanish and Chinese in addition to English, helping to serve diverse patient populations with personalized communication in their preferred language.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Maithili Rao specializes in oncology, providing comprehensive cancer care with 27 years of experience treating patients with various forms of cancer. She focuses on delivering personalized treatment plans and supportive care throughout the cancer journey. Dr. Rao practices at award-winning hospitals, ensuring patients receive care within recognized healthcare systems known for excellence.

Dr. Rao completed her medical education at Grant Medical College and pursued her residency training at Saint Barnabas Medical Center in 2004. She further advanced her expertise through fellowship training at University of Rochester Hospital in 2008. Her hospital affiliations include Hackettstown Medical Center, Chilton Medical Center, and Morristown Medical Center. She practices in multiple locations across New Jersey, including Springfield, West Orange, Pompton Plains, Morristown, and Hackettstown. Dr. Rao is multilingual, speaking Spanish, Hebrew, Hindi, and English to better serve diverse patient populations.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Samuel Kenan is a physician specializing in oncology and orthopedic surgery with 50 years of experience in medical practice. They focus on treating patients with cancer conditions as well as musculoskeletal injuries and disorders affecting bones, joints, and connective tissues. Dr. Kenan's dual expertise allows them to provide comprehensive care for patients who may need both cancer treatment and orthopedic interventions.

Dr. Kenan completed medical school at Hadassah Medical School and went on to complete residency training at Hospital For Joint Diseases Orthopaedic Institute. They are affiliated with multiple respected medical centers including Lenox Hill Hospital, The Mount Sinai Hospital, and NYU Langone Orthopedic Hospital. Dr. Kenan practices at various Northwell Health locations across New York, including facilities in Manhattan, Brooklyn, Huntington, Bay Shore, Great Neck, Garden City, and Staten Island. They are fluent in both Spanish and English, enabling them to serve diverse patient populations throughout the greater New York area.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Ilya Iofin is an orthopedic surgeon who specializes in oncology, focusing on the treatment of bone and soft tissue cancers. With 23 years of experience, he provides comprehensive care for patients facing complex musculoskeletal tumors and cancer-related orthopedic conditions. His dual expertise allows him to address both the surgical and oncological aspects of bone cancer treatment, offering patients coordinated care throughout their treatment journey.

Dr. Iofin earned his medical degree from Washington University in St. Louis School of Medicine and is affiliated with The Mount Sinai Hospital. He practices at multiple locations throughout New York, including facilities in Manhattan and Scarsdale. Dr. Iofin is fluent in both English and Spanish, enabling him to communicate effectively with a diverse patient population. His practice locations span several Mount Sinai facilities, providing patients with convenient access to specialized orthopedic oncology care across the greater New York area.

Dr. Nancy Kemeny is a medical doctor specializing in internal medicine and oncology with 55 years of experience. She focuses on providing comprehensive cancer care, combining her expertise in internal medicine with specialized oncological treatment. Dr. Kemeny practices at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, an award-winning hospital recognized for excellence in cancer care and treatment.

Nancy Kemeny completed her medical education at Rutgers New Jersey Medical School and went on to complete her residency training at St. Luke's Hospital. She maintains practice locations throughout New York, including Manhattan and Middletown, New Jersey. Her extensive hospital affiliation with Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center allows her to provide patients with access to cutting-edge cancer treatments and comprehensive care coordination across multiple specialized facilities.

response.bio_s:
Dr. Mitchell Benson is a urologist and oncologist with 49 years of experience treating patients with urological conditions and cancers. He specializes in comprehensive care that combines his expertise in both urology and cancer treatment, providing patients with coordinated treatment approaches. Dr. Benson practices at award-winning hospitals, ensuring patients receive care supported by recognized excellence in medical services.

Mitchell Benson completed his medical education at Columbia University College of Physicians & Surgeons and completed his residency training at New York Presbyterian Hospital. He is affiliated with NewYork-Presbyterian Columbia University Irving Medical Center and practices across multiple locations in New York and Scarsdale. Dr. Benson provides care to patients in both New York and Westchester County areas. He speaks both English and Spanish, helping him communicate effectively with diverse patient populations.

Dr. Lucy Sourial is an experienced physician specializing in oncology, internal medicine, and hematology with 51 years of medical practice. She focuses on comprehensive cancer care and blood disorder treatment, bringing extensive expertise to help patients navigate complex medical conditions. Dr. Sourial is affiliated with NYU Langone Orthopedic Hospital, where patients benefit from advanced medical resources and specialized care teams.

Dr. Sourial completed her medical education at the University of Cairo Faculty of Medicine and pursued residency training at Cabrini Medical Center. She practices in New York, NY, with locations including her office on 3rd Avenue and at Beth Israel Medical Center. Her multilingual abilities allow her to communicate with patients in Arabic, Spanish, and English, ensuring clear understanding and comfort during medical consultations.
